# General Counsel Advisory PLLC

> Fractional general counsel for growing and mid-size companies. Executive-level legal leadership delivered flexibly: strategic guidance, risk management and day-to-day legal advice without billing surprises, added headcount or long-term overhead.

General Counsel Advisory was founded by Julie Glasser, a seasoned legal executive with more than 15 years of law firm and in-house experience at publicly traded companies. Julie is a Certified Compliance and Ethics Professional and a Certified Corporate Governance Professional. She earned her J.D. from Columbia Law School and holds a B.A. and M.A. from Stanford University. Based in Austin, Texas; admitted to practice in Texas and New York; works with companies across the US.

## Services

- Fractional General Counsel: a senior lawyer who works as your general counsel, from a few hours a week to near full-time support during critical periods.
- Corporate Governance and Board Advisory: board support, governance practices and risk management for informed decision-making at the board and executive level.
- Compliance Programs: compliance build-outs and audits, training, policies, hotline management, internal investigations and mitigation programs.
- Corporate Transactions: transactional support across the business lifecycle, from financings and acquisitions to complex licensing and business integration.
- Employment and HR: business-aligned employment counsel for day-to-day HR legal support.
- Commercial Support and Legal Operations: commercial contracts negotiation, template library creation and legal operations optimization.

## Engagement

Clients engage Julie as a fractional general counsel, as senior backup for a lean legal team or for a single project during periods of growth or change. Pricing is time-based with flat-rate fees and project-based options sized to the hours you actually need.
